courseName: Tavily: Live Web Answers for Builders
description: A short, beginner-friendly explainer course on Tavily. It starts with what the technology is, why it exists, who it is for, and where it fits in the modern developer ecosystem, then moves from mental models to practical usage and implementation. Each lesson builds on the last in plain language.

lessons.title: How AI Finds Its Way Around a Website
How to Map a Website Without Opening a Hundred Tabs
How do you know how much you're actually using?
The Difference Between Searching and Researching
Why Long Research Jobs Don't Have to Go Silent
Why the API Says No to Your First Request
A Simpler Way to Call Tavily from Python
How do you stop a crawl from eating all your credits?
The Fast Way to Answer Everyday Questions
